raw_text: Before adding any product in cart we don't see surcharge but as soon as we add product for 300-400 rupees we still don't see it but if the item stays in your cart for 3-5 minutes, out of no where surcharge of additional 30 rupees is added forcing customer to add unnecessary items to exceed the order value of 499. Classic customer exploitation tactics.

worst experience... i used the blinkit for the first time a day before yesterday and I was so happy and wanted to suggest it to everyone but today I'm trying to order thing from evening and it's showing that they can not accept my order due to high demand... seriously... it's been more than 6 hours.. now I feel I should never rely on blinkit... very disappointed... don't download it guys just shop thing from nearby grocery stores when you paas by.. at least you'll don't have to wait for hours...

Blinkit is a nice delivery app. And their service is super and I get my item under 10 minutes as well . Well done. But you guys need to reduce price a bit but it's acceptable. overall it's good and thanks a lot for this service in this summer and thanks all the riders from blinkit. Specially I use this app for emergency whenever I need something quick👍👍♥️♥️

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐The ultimate lifesaver!Blinkit is easily the best app for instant needs because it combines unbelievable speed with an incredible variety of products—from fresh groceries to electronics—all while maintaining top-tier reliability. The interface is smooth, the tracking is pinpoint accurate, and everything arrives well-packaged in minutes. It has completely replaced my local store runs with pure convenience! Loved it ❤️❤️🌸

There are problems with quality and quality check before delivering it to customers. I frequently noticed that the weight of vegetables and fruits are not correct, they are almost missed by 30~40 percent of weight, and many times the quality is also not good. There is no point in delivering if quality and quantity is not reviewed before dispatching it to the customer when handling charges are charged separately.

before order it shows Rs.100/- voucher automatically receive after completing the delivery in this order and in addition you will get one surprise offer by playing some worse game like hitting 3 balls in juggling method. but after completing the delivery there's no Rs.100/- voucher and given one worst offer that no one can use it in life time with that worst deal. worst type of marketing to develop your app.

I've ordered the cam Pure original car refresher. I want the exact same thinh that's shown in the app. they sent something else and when I raised a request, the chat says it's the same and closed the issue. absolutely ridiculous. I cant even talk to customer executive. If you cant give us the exact order why provide the service.

I am writing to express dissatisfaction with my recent order. I ordered food for breakfast, and the app stated it would be delivered within 22 minutes. However, after waiting for an hour, the delivery did not arrive. Ultimately, the service was declared unavailable, and a refund was initiated. The refund was supposed to be completed by May 3rd, but I have not received it. The money is now gone, and I did not receive the ordered food😠.

If you are planning to buy in Udupi region, make sure you are ready to wait for long , have utmost patience,because the delivery person appointed here will be a novice, with no idea of how to use google map and with no good assistance.The app assistance is also very casual of the issues raised.When i complained that the delivery person isn't delivering the items at the said location, I was given a solution that I have to wait for a long time, not sure how much , to get my items.

I have ordered kurta pajama twice and was told your order is arriving in 2 minutes. its now 30 minutes of waiting and the order can no longer be tracked, it has disappeared. very terrible for a tourist staying at a hotel. I ordered another one 3 hours ago and it has been saying 22 minutes for the last 3 hours, can no longer be tracked and I have re order. horrible service

Blinkit provides excellent service. It's the No. 1 app for fast delivery. Some items are unavailable, but most regular items are available at the same price as offline stores, with no extra charges. That's why I'm giving it 5 stars. Thank you.

Very user friendly app. Also services of customer support are very prompt and efficient. In one of my orders, there was some short supply issue in the delivery packet. when I raised this issue, they refunded the difference amount to me very promptly.

Blinkit has completely changed my shopping experience! Super fast delivery, fresh products, great discounts, and excellent packaging every time. The app is smooth and easy to use. Customer service is also quick and helpful. Truly one of the most reliable and convenient delivery apps ever!

Blinkit is a very convenient app for quick deliveries. The products arrive fast, often within minutes, and the packaging is neat. It offers a wide variety of groceries, snacks, household items, and daily essentials. The app is easy to use, and customer support is helpful. It saves time and makes shopping much more convenient. Overall, Blinkit is a reliable and efficient delivery service.✨✨

The biggest fraud app I have ever faced. Sometimes they intentionally deliver the wrong product and sometimes they send delivered massages without sending any single product. For support functions they have only AI and most Interesting things that they refund the amount as coupon so that you will have to re-order from their so-called fake app.

Just a friendly suggestion: sometimes we add items to the cart but don’t order them immediately. When we finally want to place the order, the items we need are often out of stock and take a long time to come back. As a result, customers have to switch to other options or let go of the item they wanted. Please try to restock items as early as possible

Extremely disappointed with Blinkit. I ordered the Unigen Google Pixel Type-C Fast Charging Adapter (30W), but the product doesn't perform anywhere close to its claimed specifications. Calling it a 30W fast charger is misleading — it charges so slowly that it feels like a basic 5W charger. What's more frustrating is that Blinkit is listing such poor-quality products on its platform without proper quality checks. Customers trust Blinkit for convenience and reliability, but selling prod

I had a great experience with Blinkit. The delivery was extremely fast, and my order arrived within minutes. The products were fresh, well-packed, and exactly as listed. The app is easy to use, and the delivery partner was polite and professional. Blinkit is very helpful for urgent grocery and household needs. Highly recommended for its quick and reliable service.

The services provided by Blinkit are pathetic. Most of the time, they deliver wrong or rotten items, and on several occasions, they have completely forgotten to send ordered items. The complaint redressal mechanism is also highly inefficient and fails to resolve issues promptly. Extremely dissatisfied with the overall experience and would not recommend using this service.

Very dirty packaging and products. Received a used product. Never order expensive items from blinkit, just use it to order fast consumable products. Although those are also in very bad and dirty condition. It is better to go to your nearby departmental stores and buy in person.
